title: AdvancedRanks
description: A powerful and flexible rank system for Paper servers with prefixes, tablist sorting, and full MiniMessage support.with easy setup with the help of a GUI system
body:
# **_AdvancedRanks_**

**https://kodari.ai/?ref=DEVIL

CHECK IT OUT**


**_BEFORE YOU START READING JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER IT IS A MINECRAFT SMP WITH CUSTOM PLUGINS MADE BY ME AND SOME OTHER WELL KNOWN PLUGINS (PVP MAIN SMP) JOIN NOW THROUGH THE LINKS IN THE SIDE 
THANK YOU !!_**

**ANY BUGS AND FAULTS WITH THE PLUGIN CAN BE ADDRESSED THROUGHT MY DISCORD SERVER** 

A modern, performance-friendly rank & permission system for Minecraft servers

AdvancedRanks is a lightweight yet powerful rank management plugin built for modern Minecraft servers. It gives server owners full control over player ranks, prefixes, tablist sorting, chat formatting, and permissions—without unnecessary bloat or performance loss.

Designed for scalability and flexibility, AdvancedRanks fits perfectly on SMPs, PvP servers, minigames, and networks.

## **✨ Features**
**🔹 Rank System**

Unlimited custom ranks
1. Priority-based sorting for:
2. Tablist
3. Chat
4. Permission inheritance
5. Permanent or temporary rank assignments

**🔹 Prefixes & Formatting**
Fully customizable rank prefixes
Supports:
. & legacy colors
. Hex colors
. Gradients (MiniMessage)

Usable in:
* Chat
* Tablist
* Scoreboards (via placeholders)

**🔹 Tablist Management**

- Automatic sorting by rank priority
- Optional rank-based name coloring
- Flicker-free scoreboard integration

**🔹 Permission Handling**

Per-rank permission nodes
Rank inheritance support
Optional default rank for new players
Can run alongside other permission plugins

**🔹 Performance-Focused**

No constant ticking
Efficient data handling
Scales well on large servers

**⚙️ Configuration**

Fully YAML-driven
Easy to read & maintain
Reload changes without restarting

**🧩 Compatibility**

Works on Paper, Spigot, and Bukkit
Supports modern Minecraft versions
Compatible with chat, placeholder, and scoreboard plugins

### **📌 Why AdvancedRanks?**

Choose AdvancedRanks if you want:
A clean, modern rank system
Full control over player appearance & permissions
High performance with zero bloat

Simple configuration with powerful results
